_publications._publicationTitle: DINs: Deep Interactive Networks for Neurofibroma Segmentation in Neurofibromatosis Type 1 on Whole-Body MRI.

_contextSnippet: DINs achieve accurate segmentation of multiple tumors with one click and iteratively improves segmentation with additional interactions.
details: Achieves accurate segmentation of multiple tumors with one click and iteratively improves segmentation with additional interactions
